task: On https://books.toscrape.com, open the Mystery category and count exactly how many books in that category cost less than 20 pounds. Check every page of the category. Report the exact count.

attempts.claimed_answer:
There are exactly 10 books in the Mystery category that cost less than £20.

Page 1 (7 books under £20):
- In a Dark, Dark Wood (£19.63)
- A Murder in Time (£16.64)
- That Darkness (£13.92)
- Tastes Like Fear (£10.69)
- A Study in Scarlet (£16.73)
- Hide Away (£11.84)
- Playing with Fire (£13.71)

Page 2 (3 books under £20):
- The Cuckoo's Calling (£19.21)
- The Girl You Lost (£12.29)
- The Girl In The Ice (£15.85)

Total: 10 books under £20 out of 32 total books in the Mystery category.
